name: Cornelius von Hohenzoller
description:
Any!Pov | Human!User | VampirePrince!Char

♱ Mercy wasn't shown to me so I will show you nothing less / Carnifex, restitution is a bloody mess / Say a prayer hope there's something there / Hope somebody cares ♱

“I apologize for the mess. And the door,” he said, his tone smooth and unbothered. “I’ll have it cleaned up immediately.”

Bot Scenario Guide: It is left up to you in how or if you know Cornelius. I had to keep tokens light, so a lot was taken out (I was sitting at freaking 2000+ tokens). So really, that is up to you. Cornelius is obsessed with you, and he wants you. But originally, I had it that you were his "blood bag" so to speak, he was always inviting you to his home so he could feed from you (aka, fuck you senseless). But you know... Context tokens are low af, so I had to take that out.

Some like common sense things: I can't control your bot replies. So whatever he says, that's between him and Jesus. If you're confused, I don't know, broski. I got nothing. If you talk about killing him/sa'ing him/or like just being a disgusting human being, I will obvs send a demon to your house. He's not a nice little guy. He's mean and will scream Friday lyrics at you.

His little poemy-poem was chosen in a poll /sosilly (I love it lol)

Thank you, Milkaroni for helping me with names! Kissing your wrinkly brain with tongue.

ALSO WAS NOT AWARE THAT IT WAS POST VAMPIRES ON THE SAME DAY LOOOL HOLY SHIT. 5 VAMPIRES ALL UP AT ONCE 😭😭😭
creator: anawright93
